features.name: Preclinical Case Application
features.description: The main Datagrok app entry point for exploring preclinical trial studies, providing a tree-based navigation panel and named study views.
features.evidence_summary: The app-role function, its tree-browser companion, and the test helper that opens named views all implement the same study-navigation application shell.

features.name: XPT / SAS Data Import
features.description: Reads SAS transport (.xpt) files and parses their contents into Datagrok tables, enabling SEND/SDTM dataset ingestion.
features.evidence_summary: The fileHandler registered for the .xpt extension and the ReadSas Python script share the same data-ingestion purpose for SAS transport files.

features.name: CDISC CORE Validation
features.description: Runs the CDISC CORE rules engine against SEND datasets and renders rule violations inline in the data grid.
features.evidence_summary: The validation function and the rule-violation cell renderer are both named after the CDISC/SDISC standard and together form an end-to-end validation workflow.

features.name: Study Measurements Visualization
features.description: Custom grid cell renderers for displaying combined lab measurements and their y-axis labels within preclinical study data views.
features.evidence_summary: Both are cellRenderer-role functions that produce grid_cell_renderer outputs for measurement data and axis labeling, and naturally pair in a study data table.
